name: comparator first-char acceptance counts as correct: A owns via S before B writes the full STAR
intent: Shares the engine comparator. matches("STAR", "S") is true (a rebus solution's first character is accepted), so u1's S at seq 4 is the FIRST correct write and owns; u2's full STAR at seq 8 does not re-own. Casing is ASCII-only (INV-1). owners are userIds only (INV-6).
